questions.question: In the ultimatum game, Alice and Bob divide a pizza that is worth $100. Alice proposes a division where she gets $80 and Bob gets $20. If Bob rejects this proposal, the amount Bob gets is reduced proportionally. What is the minimum amount Bob would get if he rejects Alice's proposal?
questions.hint: Recall the properties of the ultimatum game

questions.question: A player in the ultimatum game can propose a division and then the other player can either accept or reject the proposal. What is the probability that Alice will propose a division where she gets $50 and Bob gets $50 if Alice has a 70% chance of proposing a division where she gets $80 and Bob gets $20?

An experimental ultimatum game study found that in 75% of cases, Alice proposes a division where she gets $60 and Bob gets $40. In the remaining 25% of cases, Alice proposes a division where she gets $80 and Bob gets $20. What is the expected payoff for Bob in this game?
questions.hint: Use the concept of expected value
